title.en: HELCOM HEAT (1): Generate the Assessment Units (ADVANCED mode)

description.en: Compute the assessment units for the HEAT assessment tool. The area is gridded, the grids have different sizes. Advanced mode means you can provide your own spatial units, along with a table providing the desired grid size (in which unit? pixels? meters?) for each spatial unit. This process represents subpart 1 of the original HEAT assessment computation script. For more info, please go to: https://github.com/ices-tools-prod/HEAT/tree/master

links.title: GitHub repo for the original HEAT analysis

grid_size_table.title: Table of Grid Sizes
grid_size_table.description: Table with UnitID and GridSize... We need a URL. Or maybe just the string, it is not that long...

units_gridded.title: Gridded assessment units
units_gridded.description: Assessment units for the HEAT assessment tool.

units_cleaned.title: Cleaned assessment units
units_cleaned.description: Assessment units for the HEAT assessment tool. Note: The cleaning is very individual, e.g. specific stations or islands are merged/renamed/..., so this cannot be made generic. We must require users to already provide a 'clean' file, with ascii names etc..
